definition: A foodstuff made by baking dough made from cereals.
example: We need to understand the concept of bread.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bánh mì.

definition: Cereal plants, Oryza sativa of the grass family whose seeds are used as food.
example: We need to understand the concept of rice.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về gạo.

definition: The flesh (muscle tissue) of an animal used as food.
example: A large portion of domestic meat production comes from animals raised on factory farms.
exampleVi: Phần lớn sản lượng thịt trong nước đến từ động vật được nuôi trong các trang trại công nghiệp.

definition: A cold-blooded vertebrate animal that lives in water, moving with the help of fins and breathing with gills.
example: Salmon is a fish.
exampleVi: Cá hồi là một loại cá.

definition: A domestic fowl, Gallus gallus, especially when young.
example: We need to understand the concept of chicken.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về con gà.

definition: The meat from a cow, bull or other bovine.
example: I love eating beef.
exampleVi: Tôi thích ăn thịt bò.

definition: The meat of a pig; swineflesh.
example: The cafeteria serves pork on Tuesdays.
exampleVi: Quán cà phê phục vụ thịt lợn vào các ngày thứ Ba.

definition: Any plant.
example: We need to understand the concept of vegetable.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về rau.

definition: (often in the plural) In general, a product of plant growth useful to man or animals.
example: We need to understand the concept of fruit.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về trái cây.

definition: An approximately spherical or ellipsoidal body produced by birds, reptiles, insects and other animals, housing the embryo during its development.
example: We need to understand the concept of egg.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về quả trứng.

definition: A dairy product made from curdled or cultured milk.
example: We need to understand the concept of cheese.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về phô mai.

definition: A soft, fatty foodstuff made by churning the cream of milk (generally cow's milk).
example: We need to understand the concept of butter.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bơ.

definition: A white liquid produced by the mammary glands of female mammals to nourish their young. From certain animals, especially cows, it is also called dairy milk and is a common food for humans as a beverage or used to produce various dairy products such as butter, cheese, and yogurt.
example: We need to understand the concept of milk.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về sữa.

definition: Sucrose in the form of small crystals, obtained from sugar cane or sugar beet and used to sweeten food and drink.
example: We need to understand the concept of sugar.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đường.

definition: A common substance, chemically consisting mainly of sodium chloride (NaCl), used extensively as a condiment and preservative.
example: We need to understand the concept of salt.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về muối.

definition: A plant of the family Piperaceae.
example: We need to understand the concept of pepper.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về hạt tiêu.

definition: Liquid fat.
example: We need to understand the concept of oil.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về dầu.

definition: A liquid (often thickened) condiment or accompaniment to food.
example: apple sauce; mint sauce
exampleVi: sốt táo; nước sốt bạc hà

definition: Any of various dishes commonly made by combining liquids, such as water or stock with other ingredients, such as meat and vegetables, that contribute flavor and texture.
example: Pho is a traditional Vietnamese soup.
exampleVi: Phở là món súp truyền thống của người Việt.

definition: A food made primarily of a mixture of raw or cold ingredients, typically vegetables, usually served with a dressing such as vinegar or mayonnaise.
example: We need to understand the concept of salad.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm salad.

definition: (usually in the plural) a string or strip of pasta
example: She slurped a long noodle up out of her soup.
exampleVi: Cô ấy húp một sợi mì dài ra khỏi súp.

definition: Dough made from wheat and water and sometimes mixed with egg and formed into various shapes; often sold in dried form and typically boiled for eating.
example: We need to understand the concept of pasta.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về mì ống.

definition: A plant, Allium sativum, related to the onion, having a pungent bulb much used in cooking.
example: We need to understand the concept of garlic.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tỏi.

definition: A monocotyledonous plant (Allium cepa), allied to garlic, used as vegetable and spice.
example: We need to understand the concept of onion.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về hành tây.

definition: The tuber of a plant, Solanum tuberosum, eaten as a starchy vegetable, particularly in the Americas and Europe; this plant.
example: We need to understand the concept of potato.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về khoai tây.

definition: A widely cultivated plant, Solanum lycopersicum, having edible fruit.
example: We need to understand the concept of tomato.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về cà chua.

definition: A vegetable with a nutritious, juicy, sweet root that is often orange in colour, Daucus carota, especially the subspecies sativus in the family Apiaceae.
example: We need to understand the concept of carrot.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về cà rốt.

definition: A reusable software component written in Java.
example: We need to understand the concept of bean.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đậu.

definition: A hard-shelled seed.
example: There are many sort of nuts: peanuts, cashews, pistachios, Brazil nuts and more.
exampleVi: Có rất nhiều loại hạt: đậu phộng, hạt điều, quả hồ trăn, hạt Brazil và nhiều loại khác.

definition: The harvested seeds of various grass food crops eg: wheat, corn, barley.
example: We stored a thousand tons of grain for the winter.
exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã dự trữ một nghìn tấn ngũ cốc cho mùa đông.

definition: Powder obtained by grinding or milling cereal grains, especially wheat, or other foodstuffs such as soybeans and potatoes, and used to bake bread, cakes, and pastry.
example: We need to understand the concept of flour.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bột mì.

definition: A viscous, sweet fluid produced from plant nectar by bees. Often used to sweeten tea or to spread on baked goods.
example: We need to understand the concept of honey.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về mật ong.

definition: A sweet mixture of fruit boiled with sugar and allowed to congeal. Often spread on bread or toast or used in jam tarts.
example: We need to understand the concept of jam.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm mứt.

definition: Aromatic or pungent plant matter (usually dried) used to season or flavour food.
example: We need to understand the concept of spices.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về gia vị.

definition: Any green, leafy plant, or parts thereof, used to flavour or season food.
example: We need to understand the concept of herb.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về thảo mộc.

definition: One of a family of dishes originating from South Asian cuisine, flavoured by a spiced sauce.
example: We need to understand the concept of curry.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về cà ri.

definition: Fish, shellfish, seaweed, and other edible aquatic life.
example: We need to understand the concept of seafood.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về hải sản.

definition: Any of many swimming, often edible crustaceans, chiefly of the infraorder Caridea or the suborder Dendrobranchiata, with slender legs, long whiskers and a long abdomen.
example: We need to understand the concept of shrimp.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về con tôm.

definition: A crustacean of the infraorder Brachyura, having five pairs of legs, the foremost of which are in the form of claws, and a carapace.
example: We need to understand the concept of crab.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về cua.

definition: A crustacean of the Nephropidae family, dark green or blue-black in colour turning bright red when cooked, with a hard shell and claws, which is used as a seafood.
example: We need to understand the concept of lobster.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tôm hùm.

definition: A sweet confection served as the last course of a meal
example: We need to understand the concept of dessert.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về món tráng miệng.

definition: A rich, sweet dessert food, typically made of flour, sugar and eggs and baked in an oven, and often covered in icing.
example: We need to understand the concept of cake.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bánh.

definition: A small, flat, baked good which is either crisp or soft but firm.
example: We need to understand the concept of cookie.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về cookie.

definition: A food made from ground roasted cocoa beans.
example: Chocolate is a very popular treat.
exampleVi: Sô cô la là một món ăn rất phổ biến.

definition: Edible, sweet-tasting confectionery containing sugar, or sometimes artificial sweeteners, and often flavored with fruit, chocolate, nuts, herbs and spices, or artificial flavors.
example: We need to understand the concept of candy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về kẹo.

definition: A dessert made from frozen sweetened cream or a similar substance, usually flavoured.
example: Strawberries are particularly delicious with ice cream.
exampleVi: Dâu tây đặc biệt ngon với kem.

definition: A baked food item made from flour and fat pastes such as pie crust; also tarts, bear claws, napoleons, puff pastries, etc.
example: That pastry shop sells not just pastries, but all kinds of baked goods.
exampleVi: Cửa hàng bánh ngọt đó không chỉ bán bánh ngọt mà còn bán tất cả các loại đồ nướng.

definition: A type of pastry that consists of an outer crust and a filling.
example: The family had steak and kidney pie for dinner and cherry pie for dessert.
exampleVi: Bữa tối cả gia đình ăn bít tết và bánh thận, tráng miệng là bánh anh đào.

definition: a small dish served before the main meal to stimulate the appetite
example: The restaurant offers a variety of appetizers to start your dining experience.
exampleVi: Nhà hàng cung cấp nhiều món khai vị để bắt đầu trải nghiệm ẩm thực của bạn.
collocations: cold appetizer, hot appetizer, savory appetizer

definition: a style or method of cooking, especially as characteristic of a particular country or region
example: French cuisine is renowned for its rich flavors and elegant presentation.
exampleVi: Ẩm thực Pháp nổi tiếng với hương vị phong phú và cách trình bày tinh tế.
collocations: Italian cuisine, Asian cuisine, traditional cuisine

definition: of high quality and often expensive food and drink
example: The gourmet restaurant attracts food enthusiasts from all over the city.
exampleVi: Nhà hàng sang trọng thu hút những người yêu thích ẩm thực từ khắp nơi trong thành phố.
collocations: gourmet meal, gourmet food, gourmet chef

definition: a meal where guests serve themselves from a variety of dishes set out on a table
example: The hotel offers a breakfast buffet with a wide selection of dishes.
exampleVi: Khách sạn cung cấp tiệc buffet sáng với nhiều món ăn đa dạng.
collocations: breakfast buffet, buffet style, buffet dinner

definition: to provide food and drink for an event or gathering
example: We need to cater the event with a selection of international dishes.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần cung cấp thực phẩm cho sự kiện với một lựa chọn các món ăn quốc tế.
collocations: cater an event, cater for guests, professionally cater

definition: a part of a whole, especially a serving of food
example: Each portion of the dish is carefully measured to ensure consistency.
exampleVi: Mỗi phần ăn của món ăn được đo lường cẩn thận để đảm bảo tính đồng nhất.
collocations: large portion, small portion, portion size

definition: to enjoy the taste or smell of something completely
example: Take a moment to savor the rich flavors of this dish.
exampleVi: Hãy dành một chút thời gian để thưởng thức hương vị phong phú của món ăn này.
collocations: savor the moment, savor the flavor, savor every bite

definition: a rare or luxurious food item that is considered a delicacy
example: Truffles are considered a delicacy in many gourmet restaurants.
exampleVi: Nấm truffle được coi là một đặc sản trong nhiều nhà hàng sang trọng.
collocations: local delicacy, rare delicacy, culinary delicacy

definition: to undergo fermentation, a process that converts sugar to acids, gases, or alcohol
example: Many cultures use fermenting to preserve food and enhance flavors.
exampleVi: Nhiều nền văn hóa sử dụng quá trình lên men để bảo quản thực phẩm và tăng cường hương vị.
collocations: ferment food, naturally ferment, fermenting process

definition: a worker in a skilled trade, especially one that involves making things by hand, often related to food
example: The artisan bakery is known for its handcrafted breads and pastries.
exampleVi: Tiệm bánh nghệ nhân nổi tiếng với những chiếc bánh và bánh ngọt được làm thủ công.
collocations: artisan cheese, artisan bread, artisan food

definition: to decorate a dish with small amounts of food or herbs for flavor or appearance
example: The chef decided to garnish the plate with fresh herbs for a vibrant look.
exampleVi: Đầu bếp quyết định trang trí đĩa với các loại thảo mộc tươi để tạo vẻ ngoài sống động.
collocations: garnish with herbs, garnish the dish, beautifully garnish

definition: Someone who starts something.
example: a starter on a journey
exampleVi: sự khởi đầu của một cuộc hành trình

definition: To yield, make or manufacture; to generate.
example: We need to understand the concept of produce.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm sản phẩm.

definition: Foodstuffs that taste very sweet, taken as a group; candies, sweetmeats and confections collectively.
example: We need to understand the concept of confectionery.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bánh kẹo.

definition: A formula for preparing or using a medicine; a prescription; also, a medicine prepared from such instructions.
example: We need to understand the concept of recipe.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về công thức.

definition: A type of grass (such as wheat, rice or oats) cultivated for its edible grains.
example: We need to understand the concept of cereal.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về ngũ cốc.

definition: (also dairy products or dairy produce) Products produced from milk.
example: We need to understand the concept of dairy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về sữa.

definition: Aromatic or pungent plant matter (usually dried) used to season or flavour food.
example: We need to understand the concept of spice.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về gia vị.

definition: (French Canada) A smaller dish served before the main course of a meal.
example: We need to understand the concept of entree.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm entree.

definition: A liquid to consume; a drink, such as tea, coffee, liquor, beer, milk, juice, or soft drinks, usually excluding water.
example: We need to understand the concept of beverage.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đồ uống.

definition: Something used to add taste or flavour to food, such as salt and pepper or other condiment, herb or spice.
example: We need to understand the concept of seasoning.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm gia vị.

definition: A light meal.
example: We need to understand the concept of snack.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đồ ăn nhẹ.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word maincourse.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ maincourse.

definition: Any agent, natural or artificial that acts to preserve, especially when added to food.
example: We need to understand the concept of preservative.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chất bảo quản.

definition: (nutrition) Kilogram calorie or large calorie. A unit of energy 1000 times larger than the gram calorie. It is equivalent to the gram kilocalorie, approximately 4.2 kilojoules.
example: We need to understand the concept of calorie.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm calo.

definition: The food and beverage a person or animal consumes.
example: The diet of the Giant Panda consists mainly of bamboo.
exampleVi: Chế độ ăn của Gấu trúc khổng lồ chủ yếu bao gồm tre.

definition: The organic process by which an organism assimilates food and uses it for growth and maintenance.
example: We need to understand the concept of nutrition.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm dinh dưỡng.

definition: One of the substances present in a mixture, especially food.
example: We need to understand the concept of ingredient.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thành phần.

definition: Domestic fowl (e.g. chickens, ducks, turkeys, and geese) raised for food (either meat or eggs).
example: We need to understand the concept of poultry.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về gia cầm.

definition: Something used to enhance the flavor of food; for example, salt or pepper.
example: We need to understand the concept of condiment.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm gia vị.

definition: A shop in which bread (and often other baked goods such as cakes) is baked and/or sold.
example: We need to understand the concept of bakery.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tiệm bánh.
